problem id: 31063a4d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(1) AND SHR(2)) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  11111011 -> 00110111
  10001110 -> 00000001
  11101101 -> 00011011
  11111001 -> 00110011
  00010111 -> 00000100
  00110011 -> 00000100
  11001111 -> 00010011
  00101010 -> 00000000

query: 01100000
predicted answer: 00000000
